_comment: Defense stat weights by position. Primary stats get 0.12, secondary get 0.08. Based on positional requirements diagram.

C.name: Catcher
C.description: Awareness is king for catchers. Reaction and composure help with passed balls and blocking.

1B.name: First Base
1B.description: Reaction for scooping throws. Composure for handling difficult plays.

2B.name: Second Base
2B.description: Reaction for double play turns. Composure and acrobatics for range.

SS.name: Shortstop
SS.description: Reaction is critical. Composure and arm for throws across the diamond.

3B.name: Third Base
3B.description: Reaction for hot corner. Composure and arm for long throws.

LF.name: Left Field
LF.description: Acrobatics for catches. Agility for range. Arm for throws home.

CF.name: Center Field
CF.description: Most demanding outfield position. Acrobatics, agility, and arm all critical.

RF.name: Right Field
RF.description: Acrobatics for catches. Agility for range. Strong arm for throws to third.

DH.name: Designated Hitter
DH.description: No defensive requirements. Focus entirely on batting stats.

P.name: Pitcher
P.description: Defense doesn't matter much for pitchers. Focus on pitching stats.
